name: Amprius Technologies, Inc.
summary: Part I Overview Amprius Technologies, Inc. develops, manufactures and markets lithium-ion batteries for mobility applications, including aviation, ground and marine vehicles. Our disruptive silicon anode technology is intended to enable batteries with high energy density, high power density and fast charging capabilities over a wide range of operating temperatures.
